page.pricing.title: Pricing — every feature on every plan | Persistent Cart for Shopify
page.pricing.desc: Persistent Cart is priced to your Shopify plan — every feature is included on every plan. Start free, then a 30-day free trial on any paid plan. From $4.99/mo.
page.pricing.h1: Every feature, on every plan. Priced to your Shopify plan.
page.pricing.lede: There are no feature tiers to decode. Every plan includes the full app — your price simply matches your Shopify subscription. Start free, then a 30-day free trial on any paid plan.
pricing.planHint: Your plan is selected automatically based on your Shopify subscription. You don't pick a feature tier — you get all of it.
pricing.trial: Free Starter plan · 30-day free trial on all paid plans · cancel anytime
pricing.feesNote: Every plan is a flat monthly price — no usage fees, no per-order charges.
pricing.tier.free.note: Test every feature, up to 10 cart syncs
pricing.tier.basic.note: For stores on the Shopify Basic plan
pricing.tier.grow.note: For stores on the Shopify Grow plan (formerly "Shopify")
pricing.tier.advanced.note: For stores on the Shopify Advanced plan
pricing.tier.plus.note: For stores on the Shopify Advanced and Plus plans
pricing.included.title: Included on every plan
pricing.included.1: Automatic cross-device cart sync for signed-in customers
pricing.included.2: Silent auto-merge by default — no popups, emails, or opt-ins
pricing.included.5: Works across phone, desktop, and return visits
pricing.included.6: Built for Shopify quality and performance standards
pricing.s1.h: Why it's priced to your plan, not by feature
pricing.s1.b:
Most apps make you choose a tier and ration features. Persistent Cart doesn't — the whole app is the product, so every plan gets every feature. The only thing that changes is price, which tracks your Shopify subscription level. A Basic store pays Basic pricing; a Plus store pays Plus pricing; both get identical functionality. It keeps the decision simple: there's nothing to compare except whether you want it.

Larger Shopify plans mean more orders and more signed-in shoppers switching devices — so the price tracks the value you get back, not a longer feature list.
pricing.s2.b: The Free Starter plan lets you install and test every feature for up to 10 cart syncs — enough to see it work on your own store. When you're ready, any paid plan starts with a 30-day free trial, so you only pay once you've watched it run. There's no long-term contract; cancel anytime from your Shopify admin.
pricing.s3.b: The honest answer is that it depends on how many of your shoppers sign in and switch devices. Persistent Cart is a low monthly cost designed to recover orders that would otherwise vanish silently — if even a handful of high-value carts survive each month that wouldn't have, it pays for itself. And you don't have to take that on faith: the Free Starter plan and the 30-day trial let you watch it work on your own store before it costs anything.
pricing.faq.q1.q: Do cheaper plans get fewer features?
pricing.faq.q1.a: No. Every plan includes the complete app. Your price is set by your Shopify subscription level, not by which features you want.
pricing.faq.q2.q: Is there really a free plan?
pricing.faq.q2.a: Yes — the Free Starter plan lets you install and test all features for up to 10 cart syncs, so you can confirm it works on your store before paying.
pricing.faq.q3.q: How does the free trial work?
pricing.faq.q3.a: Any paid plan starts with a 30-day free trial. You won't be charged until the trial ends, and you can cancel anytime from your Shopify admin.
pricing.faq.q4.a: Yes. Billing is handled through Shopify, so you can remove the app or cancel from your Shopify admin at any time.
